catalog.title: Fermentation & Culture Methods Catalog
catalog.description: Fixed method definitions for fermentation, cultured foods, cured meats, vinegars, beverages, and (where applicable) legally compliant, safety-first distillation workflows. Designed for SSA layer spine: method_maps → blueprints.

general: If you are immunocompromised, pregnant, or cooking for high-risk individuals, use validated recipes and strict sanitation.
When in doubt: discard. Off-odors (putrid/rotten), fuzzy colored mold on foods that shouldn’t mold, or slimy textures can indicate spoilage.
Use calibrated thermometers, pH strips/meters, and accurate scales where required.
legal: Some processes (especially alcohol distillation) may require licenses/permits depending on your jurisdiction. Always verify local laws and comply.

methods.title: Lacto-Fermented Vegetables (Core Method)
methods.summary: Salt-driven lactic acid fermentation for vegetables (kraut, curtido, kimchi-style base). Focuses on sanitation, salt control, and sensory cues.

notes: Use validated salt/pH guidance for your recipe family; SSA stores saltPercent and target pH as parameters.

saltPercent.help: Percent of vegetable weight. Use recipe-validated ranges.

targetPH.help: Optional safety target for certain ferments.

defaultSteps.title: Prepare workspace and sanitize
defaultSteps.why: Reduce unwanted microbes so lactic acid bacteria dominate.
instructions: Wash hands; sanitize jar, weights, airlock/lid, utensils.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

defaultSteps.title: Prep produce
defaultSteps.why: Uniform cuts ferment evenly and predictably.
instructions: Rinse produce; trim damaged spots; shred/slice to uniform size.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

defaultSteps.title: Salt and pack
defaultSteps.why: Salt draws brine and creates selective environment.
instructions: Weigh produce; add measured salt per chosen method; massage until brine forms; pack tightly.

avoid: Use validated processes for low-acid foods.
Maintain recommended salt/pH controls for anaerobic ferments.
ifOccurs: Discard immediately if you suspect unsafe conditions (swollen containers, off odors). Seek medical advice if exposure suspected.

defaultSteps.title: Submerge and seal
defaultSteps.why: Anaerobic brine zone prevents surface spoilage.
instructions: Ensure solids are under brine; add weight; fit airlock or burp-cap.

visualCues.label: Solids above brine
actions: Push down; add weight; top up brine if recipe allows

avoid: Use airlocks or burp jars for active ferments to prevent explosions.
ifOccurs: Move to sink, vent safely, clean spills, and consider discarding if contamination suspected.

avoid: Use validated processes for low-acid foods.
Maintain recommended salt/pH controls for anaerobic ferments.
ifOccurs: Discard immediately if you suspect unsafe conditions (swollen containers, off odors). Seek medical advice if exposure suspected.

defaultSteps.title: Ferment and monitor
defaultSteps.why: Track activity to catch issues early.
instructions: Keep at stable room temp; check daily early on; skim harmless kahm yeast if present.

avoid: Use airlocks or burp jars for active ferments to prevent explosions.
ifOccurs: Move to sink, vent safely, clean spills, and consider discarding if contamination suspected.

defaultSteps.title: Taste, decide endpoint, and cold-store
defaultSteps.why: Cold slows fermentation and stabilizes flavor/texture.
instructions: Taste with clean utensil; when desired tang reached, move to refrigerator/cold storage.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

cues.label: Burp non-airlocked jars
actions: Burp carefully; switch to airlock if recurring

references: General food fermentation safety guidance; use validated recipes for low-acid or anaerobic preparations.

methods.title: Kimchi (Traditional-Style Lacto Fermentation)
methods.summary: Structured kimchi workflow: salt-brining, seasoning paste, pack, ferment, and mature.

notes: Seasoning heat level and seafood components are parameterized.

defaultSteps.title: Sanitize and stage ingredients
instructions: Sanitize vessels/tools; stage cabbage, salt, aromatics, seasonings.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

defaultSteps.title: Salt-brine cabbage
defaultSteps.why: Brining sets texture and starts microbial control.
instructions: Salt cabbage per recipe; rest/turn periodically; rinse and drain.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

defaultSteps.title: Mix seasoning paste
instructions: Combine aromatics and seasonings; optionally include seafood component per preference.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.

ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

defaultSteps.title: Coat and pack
instructions: Coat cabbage; pack tightly; press to remove air pockets; cover to reduce oxygen.

avoid: Use airlocks or burp jars for active ferments to prevent explosions.
ifOccurs: Move to sink, vent safely, clean spills, and consider discarding if contamination suspected.

defaultSteps.title: Ferment and mature
instructions: Ferment at room temp briefly; then move to cold storage to mature.

methods.title: Sourdough Starter (Create + Maintain)
methods.summary: Starter creation and maintenance method focused on feeding schedule, sensory cues, and contamination checks.

notes: Baking steps live in cooking.methods.json; this method produces a mature starter artifact.

defaultSteps.title: Create seed mixture
instructions: Combine flour and water per chosen hydration; mix; cover loosely.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

avoid: Use airlocks or burp jars for active ferments to prevent explosions.
ifOccurs: Move to sink, vent safely, clean spills, and consider discarding if contamination suspected.

defaultSteps.title: Daily feeds (early phase)
defaultSteps.why: Build stable culture over several days.
instructions: Discard and feed on schedule; keep jar clean; track rise/fall.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

defaultSteps.title: Stabilize and store
instructions: When rise time is predictable and aroma is pleasant, move to maintenance schedule (room or fridge).

methods.title: Vinegar (Acetic Fermentation) — Core Method
methods.summary: Acetobacter-driven conversion of alcoholic base into vinegar. Emphasizes oxygen exposure and contamination management.

notes: Requires an alcoholic base; SSA can chain from beverage methods.

defaultSteps.title: Sanitize vessel
instructions: Sanitize jar/crock; use breathable cover (cloth) to allow oxygen.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

defaultSteps.title: Prepare alcoholic base
instructions: Use finished alcoholic base (validated ABV range per recipe); cool to room temp.

avoid: Keep away from flames. Use food-grade equipment. Avoid lead-containing components.
ifOccurs: Ventilate area, remove ignition sources, and follow facility safety protocols.

defaultSteps.title: Inoculate with mother/culture
instructions: Add vinegar mother or unpasteurized vinegar starter per recipe; cover with cloth; secure band.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

defaultSteps.title: Ferment with airflow
instructions: Store in dark, room-temp area; avoid disturbance early on; taste periodically.

timers.label: Vinegar fermentation
reminders: Taste every 1-2 weeks with clean utensil

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

defaultSteps.title: Bottle and store
instructions: Strain if needed; bottle; label date; store cool/dark.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

methods.title: Koji (Aspergillus oryzae) — Culture Base Method

notes: Use reputable food-grade koji spores and validated practices.

avoid: Keep away from flames. Use food-grade equipment. Avoid lead-containing components.
ifOccurs: Ventilate area, remove ignition sources, and follow facility safety protocols.

methods.summary: High-level wine fermentation workflow: must prep → ferment → rack → age → stabilize/bottle (as desired).

notes: Sanitation and controlled fermentation protect flavor.

instructions: Sanitize fermenter, airlocks, siphon, bottles.

methods.title: Pork Bacon — Cure + Rest + (Optional) Smoke (Core Workflow)
methods.summary: Curing workflow for bacon-style cuts. This is a checklist + cue method; exact cure formulation, nitrite use, and validated time/temperature are parameterized. SSA should require 'validated recipe profile' selection for production runs.

notes: Follow validated curing formulations and temperature controls.
SSA captures cure profile selection, thickness, and intended outcome (fresh-cured vs smoked).

validatedProfileId.help: Pointer to your cure profiles library (not defined here).

defaultSteps.title: Plan cure profile (validated)
defaultSteps.why: Curing safety depends on correct formulation and time/temp controls.
instructions: Select a validated cure profile in SSA (salt %, sugar %, curing salt if used, target temp, rest days).
Record cut thickness and weight.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

avoid: Use validated processes for low-acid foods.

ifOccurs: Discard immediately if you suspect unsafe conditions (swollen containers, off odors). Seek medical advice if exposure suspected.

ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

instructions: Apply cure per profile; bag or cover; refrigerate at controlled temperature; flip/redistribute on schedule.

ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

defaultSteps.title: Rinse/soak (per profile) and dry
defaultSteps.why: Adjust salinity; create pellicle for smoke adhesion.
instructions: Rinse/soak if profile requires; dry surface; rest uncovered in fridge to form pellicle.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

defaultSteps.title: Optional smoke and/or cook
defaultSteps.why: Flavor and preservation; follow safe temps.
instructions: If smoking: follow your validated smoker/cook plan; record time/temp; cool safely.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

defaultSteps.title: Slice, package, and store
defaultSteps.why: Portion for use; label for traceability.
instructions: Slice to desired thickness; package; label date and cure profile; refrigerate or freeze.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

references: Use jurisdiction-appropriate, validated curing guidance. Maintain strict refrigeration and sanitation.

methods.title: Turkey Bacon — Cure + Rest + (Optional) Smoke (Core Workflow)
methods.summary: Curing workflow for bacon-style cuts. This is a checklist + cue method; exact cure formulation, nitrite use, and validated time/temperature are parameterized. SSA should require 'validated recipe profile' selection for production runs.

notes: Follow validated curing formulations and temperature controls.
SSA captures cure profile selection, thickness, and intended outcome (fresh-cured vs smoked).

validatedProfileId.help: Pointer to your cure profiles library (not defined here).

defaultSteps.title: Plan cure profile (validated)
defaultSteps.why: Curing safety depends on correct formulation and time/temp controls.
instructions: Select a validated cure profile in SSA (salt %, sugar %, curing salt if used, target temp, rest days).
Record cut thickness and weight.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

avoid: Use validated processes for low-acid foods.
Maintain recommended salt/pH controls for anaerobic ferments.
ifOccurs: Discard immediately if you suspect unsafe conditions (swollen containers, off odors). Seek medical advice if exposure suspected.

defaultSteps.title: Sanitize and prep cut
instructions: Sanitize trays/bags; trim and pat dry; label cut.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

defaultSteps.title: Apply cure and bag/rest
instructions: Apply cure per profile; bag or cover; refrigerate at controlled temperature; flip/redistribute on schedule.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

defaultSteps.title: Rinse/soak (per profile) and dry
defaultSteps.why: Adjust salinity; create pellicle for smoke adhesion.
instructions: Rinse/soak if profile requires; dry surface; rest uncovered in fridge to form pellicle.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

defaultSteps.title: Optional smoke and/or cook
defaultSteps.why: Flavor and preservation; follow safe temps.
instructions: If smoking: follow your validated smoker/cook plan; record time/temp; cool safely.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

methods.title: Dry-Cured Whole Muscle (Generic) — Checklist Workflow
methods.summary: Generic dry-curing workflow for whole muscles (e.g., bresaola-style). Non-formulaic; requires validated profile selection.

notes: Requires humidity/temp control. SSA should store chamber setpoints.

defaultSteps.title: Select validated profile
instructions: Choose validated profile; confirm chamber capability.

avoid: Use validated processes for low-acid foods.
Maintain recommended salt/pH controls for anaerobic ferments.
ifOccurs: Discard immediately if you suspect unsafe conditions (swollen containers, off odors). Seek medical advice if exposure suspected.

defaultSteps.title: Cure/rest under refrigeration
instructions: Apply cure; rest per profile; keep cold.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

defaultSteps.title: Dry in controlled chamber
instructions: Hang/dry in chamber; monitor weight loss and surface.

visualCues.label: Case hardening risk
signals: Outside very hard while inside soft

methods.title: Distillation (Spirits) — Legally Compliant Workflow (Non-operational)
methods.summary: Non-operational, compliance-first distillation method for SSA planning. It does NOT provide step-by-step still operation. Use for tracking licensed production runs, co-packer jobs, or permitted facilities.

notes: This method is intentionally non-instructional. It is designed for compliance tracking and workflow orchestration in SSA.
SSA should require a 'licensedFacilityId' and 'permitStatus' before allowing 'run' status.

defaultSteps.title: Verify legal compliance and facility
instructions: Confirm jurisdiction rules; confirm licensing/permits; select licensed facility or co-packer.

avoid: Verify legal compliance (licenses/permits). Use licensed facilities if required.
ifOccurs: Pause the process and move to a compliant pathway (licensed distillery/co-packer).

defaultSteps.title: Log batch inputs and transport chain
instructions: Record source batch IDs, volumes, dates, and custody chain.

avoid: Keep away from flames. Use food-grade equipment. Avoid lead-containing components.
ifOccurs: Ventilate area, remove ignition sources, and follow facility safety protocols.

defaultSteps.title: Execute run under facility SOP
defaultSteps.why: Facility runs the process under its SOP.
instructions: Mark run as executed by facility; attach SOP reference and measured outputs from facility logs.

avoid: Keep away from flames. Use food-grade equipment. Avoid lead-containing components.
ifOccurs: Ventilate area, remove ignition sources, and follow facility safety protocols.

defaultSteps.title: Quality review and compliant packaging
instructions: Record lab results if provided; record packaging run, labels, and regulatory marks.

avoid: Keep away from flames. Use food-grade equipment. Avoid lead-containing components.
ifOccurs: Ventilate area, remove ignition sources, and follow facility safety protocols.

defaultSteps.title: Store and distribute per regulations
instructions: Record lot IDs, storage location, distribution ledger.

avoid: Keep away from flames. Use food-grade equipment. Avoid lead-containing components.
ifOccurs: Ventilate area, remove ignition sources, and follow facility safety protocols.

legal: Do not attempt distillation without required licenses/permits. Use licensed facilities where required.
references: Compliance-first workflow; operational guidance must come from licensed facility SOPs and legal counsel.

methods.title: Indigenous Sorghum/Millet Beer (Traditional Workflow)
methods.summary: High-level traditional sorghum/millet beer workflow capturing stages and cues. Recipe-specific details are parameterized.

notes: Local traditions vary widely; SSA treats this as a method family with recipe profiles.

defaultSteps.title: Prepare grain base (per tradition)
instructions: Prepare grain base according to selected cultural profile.

avoid: Clean and sanitize vessels, tools, and work surfaces.
Use clean hands/gloves; avoid cross-contamination.
ifOccurs: Stop and re-sanitize. If active fermentation is compromised and spoilage signs are present, discard batch.

defaultSteps.title: Cool and inoculate
instructions: Inoculate using selected starter approach (wild, backslop, or culture).

avoid: Use airlocks or burp jars for active ferments to prevent explosions.
ifOccurs: Move to sink, vent safely, clean spills, and consider discarding if contamination suspected.

defaultSteps.title: Ferment and monitor
instructions: Monitor aroma and bubbles; stop at preferred strength/tartness.
